message:
feat(tutorial): integrate previously unused imports meaningfully

Instead of removing unused imports, integrate them for real value:

TutorialCodeBlock:
- useMotionValue/useTransform: Smooth scroll-linked opacity on scroll
  indicators (replaces binary state-based visibility)
- Copy icon: Visual keyboard shortcut hint (Cmd/Ctrl + Copy icon)

TutorialPathCard:
- Zap icon: Used for in_progress status (conveys active energy)
- Trophy icon: Used for completed status (celebratory achievement)

TutorialStep:
- Target icon: Learning objectives header (represents goals)
- Zap icon: Action checklist header (quick actions energy)
- BookOpen icon: Now used for learning objective list items

TutorialCheckpoint:
- AnimatePresence: Wraps confetti for proper exit animations
- Sparkles: Orbiting sparkle particles around trophy icon
- PartyPopper: Flanking icons beside celebration title

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
